title: MUHCS Card chungchanga hriattur pawimawh
content:
163/2026-2027

Aizawl; 15thApril, 2026 :MUHCS 2.0 chu April Ni 1, 2026 atangin hman tan a ni dawn a, Govt Employees/PE leh General Beneficiarles (mipul nawlpui man chawla inziak lut) te chuan MUHCS hmang turin MUHCS card an neih hmasak ngei a ngai a. CSS/GIA, Pensioner leh AB PM-JAY (Golden Card) hmang thei tan erawh tun dinhmun ah MUHCS Card hi siam a la ngai lo thung.

CSS/GIA leh Pensioner tan MUHCS Subscription form hmangin MUHCS hnuaiah enkawlna an dawng thei a, AB PM-JAY chhungkua tan Golden card hmangin MUHCS hnuaiah enkawina a dawn theih bawk.

MUHCS Card hi Common Service Centre (CSC) hnenah emaw damdawi in luh rualin empanelled damdawi inah siam theih a ni a,https://muhcs.mizoram.gov.in/ah mahnia siam mai theih a ni bawk.

MUHCS Card hi siam hun bituk a awm lo a, mahni remchan dana siam mai theih a ni.

title: Kawrthah Forest Division in Forest dan leh hrai zirtirna hun hmang
content:
162/2026-2027

Dated: Mamit the 15th of April,2026:Vawiin khan Kawrthah Forest Division YMA Run, Kawrthah Hmarveng-ah “Kan ramngaw kan nunna” tih leh “Kan ramngaw hi kan nun khawchhuahna a ni” tih thupuia hmangin forest dan leh hrai te inhriattirna hun hman a ni a, Pu Karthikeyan V, DFO Kawrthah chuan hun a hmanpui.

Pu Karthikeyan V chuan Forest (Reserve Forest) chhunga cheng khaw mipuite dikna chanvo leh mawhphurnate mipuite hnenah hrilhfiahin, Tut-Langkaih Protected Council Reserved Forest chungchang sawifiahna te a nei a ni.

Vawiin programme-in a tum ber chu forest ram chhunga cheng khaw mipui ten forest kaihhnawih dan an hriat te, an dikna leh mawhphurhna hriattir te leh mihringte leh ramngaw inkara inkungkaihna tha tak a awm zel theihna tura hmalak te a ni. Tut-Langkaih Protected Council Reserved Forest chungchang an hriat dan questionnaire buatsaih chu mipui kalkhawm ten ziakin an chhang a,inhrilhfiah a nih hnuah he mi chungchang vêk questionaire hi chhan tir leh an ni. Kawrthah khawchhunga Village Council member te, MUP, MHIP leh YMA Committee member te nen hun hman a ni.

Mipui lam atangin Forest Department chunga an lungawihlohna leh harsatna an tawhte ngaihthlak niin chinfelpui dan tur te sawiho a ni.

Attachment

title: ORDER REALESE FROM THE OFFICE OF THE DEPUTY COMMISSIONER LAWNGTLAI
content:
23/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 15th April 2026:The Deputy Commissioner, Lawngtlai District hereby issues the following Order regarding District Level Monitoring Cell

ORDER

No. A. 48011/6/2025(FCS)-DC (LTI) : In supersession of this Office Order of Government Notification vide No. B. 12013/11/2025- FCS&CA DATED 1.4.2026. District Level Monitoring Cell for Lawngtlai District is hereby re- constituted comprising the following members.

Chairman : Deputy CommissionerMember Secretary: DCSO, LawngtlaiMembers : 1. Inspector, Legal Metrology Department, Lawngtlai2. Manager, Khuma Gas Agent, Lawngtlai3.Manager, B. Sangchema Filling Station, L- III4. President, Consumer Association, Lawngtlai

Terms of Reference

The Cells shall perform the following functions:-

1. Monitor the stock position, supply and distribution of LPG cylinders and POL within the District.

2. Ensure smooth and uninterrupted supply of LPG and POL to consumers, particularly to priority institutions such as Hospitals and Educational institutions.

3. Prevent and monitor instances of hording, black marketing and pilferage of LPG cylinders and POL.

4. Coordinate with Oil Marketing Companies, LPG distributors and POL Dealers and district authorities to adress any supply disruption or logistical issues.

5. Submit periodic report to the Government regarding LPG and POL stock positions and highlight any issues requiring intervention.

Sd/-DONNY LALRUATSANGADeputy CommissionerLawngtlai District, Lawngtlai

Attachment

title: Tuirial leh Mauchar (NEEPCO) inkar kawngah lirthei tlan khap
content:
161/2026-2027

15th April, 2026:Tuirial leh Mauchar (NEEPCO) inkar kawng chu PWD ten siamthat hna ngawrh takin an thawk mek zel a. Chuvangin, hnathawktute ten tluang tak leh tha taka an thawh chhunzawm zel theih nan leh Sr. Executive Engineer, PWD, National Highway Division -II, Aizawl, Mizoramin a rawn ngen angin Aizawl SP chuan Government of Mizoram Notification No.B.12021/10/2004-TRP Dt 01.06.2020 leh Motor Vehicle Act, 1988 (Act 59 of 1988) Section 155 in thuhneihna a pek angin, a hnuaia mi ang hian thupek a tichhuak.

April ni 15, 2026 (Nilaini) atanga May ni 15, 2026 (Zirtawpni) thleng hian Tuirial leh Mauchar (NEEPCO) inkar kawngah lirthei eng chi mah tlan phal a ni lo.

PWD, NH Division -II te hian Village Council, Mauchar te nen thawkhoin a tul dan angin kawng block chhung chu mipui harsatna thlen palh thulah ruahmanna an siam ang.

He thupek hian chhiatrupna thil, kangmei leh emergency kaihhnawih a duty, dan leh thupek pawimawh bika Police leh Magistrate dute te chetvelna a huam lo ang. He thupek bawhchhia chu u/s 177 & 179 Motor Vehicles Act, 1988 hmang hrem theih an ni ang.

title: BDO CHAMPHAI RD BLOCK LEH NABARD HMALAKNAIN MOBILE CART HLANNA NEIH A NI
content:
160/2026-2027

Champhai, dated 15th April, 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 11:00 khan BDO Office, Ruantlang-ah BDO Champhai RD Block leh NABARD-te hmalakna tangkawp kaltlangin, Self Help Group (SHG) member-te eizawnna tihhmasawnna tur 'Mobile Cart' hlanna hun hman a ni. He hlanna inkhawm hi Pi Lalremruati Khawlhring, BMM (Block Mission Manager) chuan a kaihruai a. Dr. Vanlalnunpuii Ralte, BDO Champhai RD Block chuan SHG member pali (4) te hnenah Mobile Cart hi a hlan a ni.

BDO, Dr. Vanlalnunpuii Ralte chuan thu sawiin, hmeichhiate chu hmasawnna kawnga ke pen chhuak tur leh hmasawnna thlentu pawimawh tak an nih thu a sawi a. "Hmeichhiate hian rilru hrisel leh ngaihtuahna dik kan put a, rinawmna nena hma kan lak hian chhungkua leh khawtlangah hmasawnna thlentu kan ni thei a ni," tiin kalkhawmte a fuih a ni.

He Mobile Cart-te hi SHG member-ten an eizawnna kawngah nasa taka an hmanraw tangkai a nih theih nan leh an tharchhuah hrang hrangte awlsam zawk leh thianghlim zawka an zawrh chhuah theih nana ruahman a ni.

Inkhawm programme zawh hian, Mobile Cart-te hi a dawngtu turte awmna hmun, Indo-Myanmar border khua Zokhawthara hman nghal turin vailiam nghal an ni bawk.

title: AMC, 2026 INTHLANPUI NEIH TURA POLLING OFFICIAL TE COMPUTER HMANGA RANDOMIZED AN NI
content:
159/2026-2027

Aizawl; 15thApril,2026:Vawiinah khan Aizawl DC Meeting Hall-ah, AMC, 2026 General Election-a General observer atana ruat  Pu Lalnunhlua, Additional Secretary, Agriculture & Farmers Welfare Dept. leh recognized political party 4: INC,BJP,MNF leh ZPM aiawh te telpuina hnuaiah AMC,2026 inthlanpuia polling official tur: Presiding Officers leh Polling Officers te randomization programme  hman niin, Election Officer bakah Municipal Returning Officer (MRO) leh Assistant Municipal Returning Officer(AMRO) te pawh he randomization programme-ah hian an tel.

AMC, 2026 inthlanpuia polling official hman theih tura awm  te hi  PRO tan 330, PO-I tan 330 leh PO-II tan 329 an ni a. Heng atang hian  vawiin 2ndRandomization-ah hian Polling station 264-a duty tur PRO-264, PO-I-264 leh PO-II -264 leh, ward tin tan Reserve 20%  nen computer chuan a thlangchhuak (randomized) a. Polling Team 1 a awm tur PRO leh PO-I leh PO-II te herchhuak ( randomized) lehin, chung Polling team te chu Ward 19-ah a semdarh (randomized) leh ta a ni.  Saturday (18/04/2026) khian Final Randomization neih leh tur a ni a, hetah hian Ward tin a Polling team te chu Ward tin chhunga an duty na tur Polling station theuhva computer hmanga semdarh( randomized) leh an ni ang.

AMC hnuaiah hian Ward 19 awmin, heta tanga Ward 6(paruk) hi hmeichhe tana reserved a ni a, Local council 89 leh Polling Station 264 a awm mek a ni.

Attachment

title: Mamit-ah Sampoornata Abhiyan 2.0 kharna hun hman a ni
content:
158/2026-2027

Dated: Mamit the 15th of April,2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Mamit-ah Sampoornata Abhiyan 2.0 kharna Pu Suvigya S Chandra, District Bawrhsap hova hman a ni a, line department te’n an hmalak leh thlen chin sawizauna an nei.

Pu Suvigya S Chandra chuan he campaign hi line department te thahnemngaihna tel lo chuan a hlawhtling thei lo a, mahni mawhphurna hlen chhuaka an tum chin (target) an hlen thei chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin hemi kawnga hmalatu front line workers te chungah lawmthu a sawi a. Hlawhtlinna nei tur chuan thawhhona tha neih a pawimawh a,khawtlang hruaitute nen inpawh taka thawh ho zel a beisei thu a sawi bawk.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian health, education, WCD, AH& Vety leh Reiek Aspirational block atangin Sampoornata Abhiyan 2.0 hnuaia hnathawh sawizauna ngaihthlak a ni a, hemi campaign hnuaia an tum(target)a tam zawkah hlenchhuah niin tun thla chhunga hlenchhuah kim ngei beisei a ni.

Sampoornata Abhiyan 2.0 hi 28th January,2026 atanga 14th April,2026 chhung kalpui tur niin India rama Aspirational district leh Aspirational block-ah te hman a ni a, Mamit District leh Reiek Block-ah kalpui a ni. Tehfung paruk -

1. Health & Nutrition (hnuaiah 3)2. Agriculture (hnuaiah 1)3. Education (hnuaiah 2)

hnuaiah kalpui niin hemi program chhung hian line department te’n an ruahman an kalpui kim thei em tih endik a ni.

Vawiin hunah hian Pi Carolyn LB Khiangte, Addl DC, line department aiawhte, front line workers leh VC te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: MEETING HELD UNDER THE CHAIRMANSHIP OF LAWNGTLAI DEPUTY COMMISSIONER TO DISCUSS PREVENTION OF MEASLES OUTBREAK FROM BANGLADESH
content:
22/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 15th April 2026:A meeting was held today at the DC Office Chamber in Lawngtlai under the chairmanship of Shri Donny Lalruatsanga,Deputy Commissioner to discuss preventive measures and preparedness against the ongoing spread of measles in Bangladesh, so as to safeguard the district.

Shri Donny Lalruatsanga expressed his appreciation to all attendees. He highlighted that more than a hundred lives have already been lost due to measles in Bangladesh. He emphasized that taking timely preventive actions and preparedness measures is of utmost importance. Since Lawngtlai district shares an international border with Bangladesh, there is a high possibility of the disease entering the district. Therefore, apart from the medical teams, the public must remain vigilant and cautious.He pointed out that children below 5 years are especially vulnerable, and stressed the importance of taking the MR (Measles-Rubella) vaccine. Parents were urged to ensure that their children receive vaccination on time. Further he urged the concerned departments to issue advisories in advance in order to strengthen and effectively implement preventive measures.

The Deputy Commissioner further stressed that villages along the border need to be extra cautious and urged community leaders to actively participate in preventive efforts. He mentioned that symptoms of measles include fever, runny nose, red eyes, and skin rashes. Anyone showing such symptoms should immediately seek medical attention. Early detection is crucial to prevent outbreaks, and he urged the Health Department and World Health Organization (WHO) to continue their proactive efforts.

He also stated that both the District Level Task Force and Block Level Task Force are actively working to prevent measles and other diseases. The public was urged to cooperate in preventing the spread, and the District Administration assured that it will continue to take all necessary measures with support from Village Councils, NGOs, Churches, and the general public.

Dr. Lalmuanawma Jongte, Senior Chief Medical Officer, explained preventive measures against measles. He stated that vaccination is the most effective protection and emphasized the need to achieve over 95% MR vaccination coverage. The vaccine is administered in two doses to children aged 9–12 months and 16–24 months.He explained that measles is caused by the measles virus and spreads through the air, making it highly contagious. Strong surveillance measures are being implemented. Rapid Response Teams have been activated at PHCs and CHCs, and Mobile Vaccination Teams are also on standby. He also confirmed that adequate stocks of MR vaccine and Vitamin A are currently available for the district.

Dr. Lalhlimpuii from the World Health Organization (WHO) shared an overview of their activities. She noted that measles cases had previously been reported in Lawngtlai district during January and February last year, but no fatalities occurred due to effective response. She pointed out that incomplete vaccination remains an issue, and intensified efforts are ongoing. She also confirmed that no measles cases have been reported so far this year, and preventive measures will continue. Dr. Remlalnghaki, DIO, presented data on MR1 and MR2 vaccination coverage among children under one year of age along with HPV Vaccination over the period April 2025 to March 2026. While MR1 coverage is satisfactory, MR2 coverage remains low, and efforts are being intensified to improve it. She further stated that special initiatives are currently being actively carried out in the area of HPV vaccination.

The meeting was attended by the Senior Chief Medical Officer, Project Director (DRDO),Deputy CMO,  representative of DMS, SDO (PHED), representative of District Social Welfare Officer, District Civil Supplies Officer, Block Development Officer, President of CYLA, representative of Bazar VC, representatives from UNDP, and representatives from the World Health Organization (WHO). Shri Donny Lalruatsanga delivered the vote of thanks and brought the meeting to a close.

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP KAIHHRUAIIN BANGLADESH RAMA SENTÛT (MEASLES)  LENG MEK LAKA LO INVEN DAN TUR NGAIHTUAHA THUTKHAWM NEIH A NI
content:
157/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 15th April 2026:Vawiin khan Lawngtlai Bawrhsap kaihruaiin DC Office Chamber-ah Bangladesh rama sentut ( Measles) leng mek laka kan lo fihlim theih nan a inven dan leh lo inralrin dan tur chungchang ngaihtuaha thutkhawm neih a ni.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kalkawhmte hnena lawmthu sawina a nei a. Sentût vangin Bangladesh ah tun thlengin nunna za aia tam chân a ni tawh tih tarlangin, lo inralrin leh tih tur tul ang angte lo tih lâwk chu hna hmasa neih a ngai hle a ni, a ti a. Lawngtlai District chu Bangladesh nen a ramri nei a nih angin hri lo leng lut thei reng a nih thu tarlangin, medical team bakah Lawngtlai mipuite lo in ralrin a tul tiin, fimkhur turin a chah a. A bik takin naupang kum 5 hnuai lamin an vei nasa thin tih tarlangin Bawrhsap chuan MR Vaccine- lâk a pawimawh tak zet tih tarlangin, Nu leh Pate chu an fate a hma lama vaccine lak tir theuh turin a chah a. Chak zawka invenna kalpui turin a hma lama Advisory chhuah turin Department hotute a chah a ni.

Bawrhsap chuan ramri a awm khuate an fimkhur zual a tul hle tih tarlangin, fimkhur kawngah khawtlang hruaitute theihtawp lo chhuah turin a ngen a. Khawsik, hritlâng awmna- hnaptui tla, leh mit sen, taksa a sena bawl chu a lanchhuana ber a nih angin hetiang natna vei an awm chuan a rang lama in entir turin a chah a ni. Natna darhzau lo tura a hma lama hriatchhuah chu thil pawimawh hmasa a nih tarlangin, hemi kawngah hian Health Department leh WHO - te theihtawp chhuah chhunzawm zel turin a chah a. Sentût leh natna dang laka inven nan District Level Task Force leh Block Level Task Force - ten a tul anga hma an lak mek thu a sawi a. Sentût vanga chiaia lo tura mipuite a chahin Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan District Administration - in theihtawp a chhuah zel dawn tih tarlangin,VC , NGO, Kohhran leh mipuite thawhpuina a sawm nghal bawk.

Dr. Lalmuanawma Jongte, Sr. Chief Medical Officer, chuan Sentût (Measles) leng mek laka lo inrâlrin dan tur sawizauna a nei a. Vaccine lak that chu invenna tha ber a nih thu sawiin, 95% sia tam MR Vaccine la ngei tura hmalak a tul thu a tarlang a. Vaccine chu naupang (9-12 months) leh (16- 24 Months) hnenah pek thin a ni a, dose hnih pek thin a ni a ti. Sentút chu Measles Virus - in a thlen thin tih sawiin, boruakah a leng thei tih rhiata fimkhur a tul hle a ni a ti. Sentût laka lo inven nan chak zawka surveillance kalpui a nih tur thu sawiin, PHC leh CHC ah Rapid Response Team tih nun vek tawh niin, , Mobile Vaccination Team - te pawh an inralrin tawh thu a sawi a. Tun dinhmunah MR Vaccine leh Vitamin A, mamawh zat kawl mek a nih thu a tarlang a ni.

Dr. Lalhlimpuii, WHO chuan an hmalak dan tlangpui sawizauna a nei a. Lawngtlai District - ah nikum January leh February thlaah Sentût a lo puang ve tawh tih tarlangin, theihtawp chhuah a nih angin nunna chân an awm lo a ni, a ti. Vaccine- la kimlo an awm thin tih tarlangin, hemi kawngah hian chak zawka hmalak mek a nih thu a sawi a. Kumin bikah sentût vei an awm lo tih tarlangin, theih ang anga hmalak chhunzawm zel a ni ang a ti. Dr. Remlalnghaki, DIO chuan April 2025- March 2026 chhunga nuapang kum khat hnuai lam MR1 leh MR2 vaccine lak dan leh HPV vaccine tlangpui tarlanna a nei a. MR1 lak a that viau laiin, MR2 - la an tlahniam hle tih tarlangin, hemi kawngah hian chak zawka hmalak mek a ni, a ti. HPV Vaccination bikah hmalakna kalpui mek a ni, a ti.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Sr. Chief Medical Officer,  Project Director (DRDO), Dy. CMO, DMS aiawh, SDO  (PHED), District Social Welfare Officer, District Civil Supplies Officer, Block Development Officer, President, CYLA, Bazar VC aiawh, UNDP aiawh leh   World Health Organisation (WHO) aiawhte an tel thei a. Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawina neiin hun a khar.

title: KUHVA CHINGTUTE TAN KVK KOLASIB-IN TRAINING A BUATSAIH
content:
156/2026-2027

Kolasib, 15th April, 2026:Vawiin khan Krishi Vigyan Kendra (KVK), Kolasib District buatsaihin Bilkhawthlir Kuhva Chingtu Pawl-te tan “Integrated Scientific Approach for Sustainable Arecanut Production in Kolasib District” tih thupui hmangin kuhva chingtute hnenah zirtirna pek a ni.

He hunah hian Khuallian, Kolasib Deputy Commissioner Pu H. Dolianbuaia chuan thu sawiin, kuhva chu Mizoram tana eizawnna kawnga innghahna ban pawimawh tak a nih thu leh, state economy chawikang theitu lian tak a nih thu a tarlang a. Kuhva chingtu kalkhawmte chu tangkai taka an hna thawk a, theihtawp chhuah zel turin a chah a ni. Hlawhtlinna tluantling zawk nei tur chuan mahni ngaihdan ngawt kalpui lova, mithiamte thurawn la thin turin a chah bawk a. Hemi kawnga KVK Kolasib-in kuhva chingtute tana tangkai tur zirtirna hun tha tak an buatsaih thei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi bawk.

He hun hi Dr. Michelle C. Lallawmkimi, Senior Scientist & Head, KVK Kolasib chuan a kaihruai a. Kalkhawmte chu KVK Kolasib-a mithiam, thiamna hrang hrang neite chu tangkai taka hmang a, anmahni rawn nachang hria a an thurawnte zawm thin turin a chah a ni. Mizoram Kuhva Chingtu Pawl (MKCP) Bilkhawthlir Branch President Pu K. Thanliana pawhin thu sawiin, pawl hmalakna leh an sum lakluh zat report a pe a. Hun rei tak ata an kuhva enkawlna lama harsatna an tawhte sutkian a nih theih nana KVK Kolasib-in zirtirna a lo pe thei chu lawmthu a sawi bawk a ni.

He training-ah hian KVK mithiam (expert) mi pali ten hlawm hrang hrangah thenin zirtirna an pe a. Hengte hi zirtirna pek a nih dan chu a ni:

1. PC Lalrintluanga, Subject Matter Specialist (Horticulture):"Sustainable production technologies of Arecanut with special reference to Kolasib district"

2. Dr. Carolyn Zothansiami, Subject Matter Specialist (Soil Science):"Optimizing soil health for enhancing productivity in Arecanut cultivation"

3. Esther Zonunpuii, Subject Matter Specialist (Plant Protection): "Epidemiology and management of major pest and diseases in Arecanut"

4. R Lalchhandami, Subject Matter Specialist (Agri. Engineering): "Role of Agriculture Engineering interventions in enhancing productivity and sustainability in Arecanut"

Zirtirna pek a nih hnu hian Farmer-Scientist interaction hun hman nghal a ni a, hetah hian kuhva chingtuten an kuhva enkawlna lama an harsatna tawhte zawhna siamin mithiamte nen sawihona hun tha tak an hmang a ni. He training kharna leh lawmthu sawina hi Pu Rualthantluanga, Fishery Specialist chuan a nei a ni.

Attachment

title: Mamit District chhunga Village council - 18 te hnenah Computer sem
content:
155/2026-2027

Dated : Mamit the 15th of April, 2026 :Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall-ah Mamit-ah Pu Suvigya S Chandra,District Bawrhsap chuan Mamit District chhunga Village council - 18 te hnenah Computer Set a sem.

District Bawrhsap chuan VC 18 te hnena Computer set sem a ni chu lawmawm hle a, a dawngtu VC te pawhin hmasawnna leh tunlai changkanna mil zela hnathawhna tur niin chumi tur pawh chuan Sawrkar pawhin min beisei a ni a ti a, khawl hmang tangkai thei tura mahni pawh inzir turin Village Council te a chah a ni.

Pu John Lalnunsanga, SPM, RGSA, RD&AD chuan Village Council te hnena Computer Set sem a nih chungchang sawizauna a nei.

He hunah hian Dr.Lalngura Tlau, Director, Local Administration, Rural Development & Administration Department pawhin Village Council te hnena Computer Set sem a nih theihna tura Sawrkar hmalakna avangin lawmthu a sawi a, Village Council te chu ram leh khawtlang tana theihtawpchhuah tlang zel turin a sawm bawk.

Computer Set te hi Rashtriya Gram Swaraj Abhiyan (RGSA) scheme atanga sem niin Mizoram chhunga Village Council zawng zawngte pek vek tum niin a tahtawlin sem mek zel a ni a. Sawrkar chuan Village Council te chu khawtlang mipui rawng an bawlna kawngah tunlai computer technology thiamna hmanga tangkai taka hna thawk turin a ngen a ni.

He hun hi Pu Lalchhanhima, DLAO Mamit leh Project Director ni bawk chuan kaihruaiin, Mamit District chhunga VC -18 aiawhte an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Mizo Inneih, Inthen leh Rokhawmna Dan ennawnna Review Committee thukhawm
content:
153/2026-2027

15th April, 2026 :Vawiin khan Mizo Inneih, Inthen leh Rokhawmna Dan ennawnna Review Committee chu an Chairman Pu Zahmingthanga Ralte, Law & Judicial Department-a Addl. Secretary hoin Chief Secretary Conference Hall-ah an thukhawm.

Kum 2026 Assembly Session hnuhnung berin a pass, Mizo Inneih leh Rokhawmna Dan siamthatna - the Mizo Marriage and Inheritance of Property (Amendment) Act chuan Mizoram mipuite zingah ngaihdan hrang hrang, a thlawp zawng leh sawiselna lam te a piang a. Mizoram Sorkar chuan heng ngaihdan leh sawiselna awm te hi a dik leh dik lo te zirchianga, engtia kalpui tur nge tih uluk taka zir tura a tih angin Review Committee thutkhawm hi koh a ni. Vawiin thutkhawma ngaihtuah zingah hian MHIP General Headquarters-in Assembly Speaker hnena an lungawilohna leh en tha tura an ngenna lehkha te, Val Upa Council-in Chief Minister hnena en that an ngenna leh rawtna an thlen te pawh a tel a.

Chairman Pu Zahmingthanga Ralte chuan sawiselna leh ngaihdan hrang hrang te chu uluk takin zir a ni a, a then chu thil niawm tak ni a a lan laiin, tam tak sawiselna erawh thil hriatchian tawk loh vang a ni, a ti. The Mizo Marriage and Inheritance of Property (Amendment) Act, 2026 chu Mizoram Gazette-ah March ni 6 khan chhuah niin hemi ni atang hian hman nghal a ni a. Chairman chuan “Kohhran hrang hranga Inneihna kawltu zawng zawngin an hriat tur chu, he dan hnuaiah hian nupui pasal then tawhin midang an neih leh dawn chuan Court atangin Divorce Certificate an neih ngei ngei a ngai a, chutiang nei lova nupui pasal dang nei chu BNS Sec.82 angin kum 7 thleng lung in tan leh pawisa chawia hrem theih an ni dawn”, a ti a. Fimkhur taka inneihna kalpui turin a chah a ni.

Vawiin thukhawmah hian Mizoram Kohhran Hruaitute Committee (MKHC), Council of Churches in Mizoram (CCM), Mizo Language Development Board, MHIP Headquarters, MUP Headquarters, Women Commission, Bar Association bakah mi thiam leh tui mite an tel a. Chairman chuan Meeting a telte hnena lawmthu sawiin, Mizo chhungkaw tin leh mimal tin khawih thil ngaihtuah a nih avangin fimkhur leh uluk taka ngaihtuahna seng turin a chah a, meeting neih leh huna thutlukna tha tak siam thei turin Member te a chah bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: SP MAMIT THUPEK CHHUAH
content:
152/2026-2027

Dated: Mamit the 15th of April, 2026 :Lengpui atanga Saiphal Bamboo Plantation (41 Km) chu Nidhi Creative Infrastructure Pvt. Ltd. ten concrete pavement-a siam hna an thawk mek a. Kawng tha zawk leh tlo zawk kan neih theih nan hun engemaw chen chu lirthei in zawhlo se tha a hriat a ni a.

Chuvangin, Pu Manny Bhushan Singh, IPS, Superintendent of Police, Mamit District chuan Motor Vehicle Act, 1988 (Act 59 of 1988) section 115 leh Mizoram Sawrkar Notification No. B.12021/10/2004-TRP Dt. 01.06.2020 in thuneihna a pek angin W.Serzawl peng (Ch-14.00 Km) atanga Saiphal bridge (Ch-36.00 Km) thlengin Lirthei kal khapna thupek a chhuah.

He thupek hian 14th April, 2026 atanga 28th April, 2026 thleng a huam ang. Hetih rual hian light vehicle tan chawlhkar khat chhungin ni khat kal theih tura hawn thin a ni ang.

Kawng tha zawk kan neih theihna tur a nih avangin thupek ngaipawimawha zawm theuh turin mipuite kan in ngenin kan inhriattir a. Thupek zawmlo te chu 179 MV Act hmanga hrem an ni ang.
